inputs.label: Desired Illuminance
inputs.businessContext: Target light intensity at the substrate level in lux (10-20 low, 20-40 medium, 40+ high)

businessContext_i18n.en: Target light intensity at the substrate level in lux (10-20 low, 20-40 medium, 40+ high)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Substrat seviyesinde lüks cinsinden hedef ışık yoğunluğu (10-20 düşük, 20-40 orta, 40+ yüksek)

businessContext_i18n.fr: Intensité lumineuse cible au niveau du substrat en lux (10-20 faible, 20-40 moyen, 40+ élevé)
businessContext_i18n.es: Intensidad de luz objetivo en el nivel del sustrato en lux (10-20 baja, 20-40 media, 40+ alta)
